title: 6 Pcs Balloon Weight with Ribbon, Red Star Foil Helium Balloon Weights for Birthdays, Parties, Weddings, Table Decorations and Celebrations
features: Stylish Red Star Balloon Weights: Secure your helium balloons with these vibrant red star-shaped weights, perfect for adding a bold pop of colour to birthdays, parties, and celebrations.
Helium Balloon Weights with Ribbon: Each pack includes two 5m rolls of matching red ribbon, making it easy to tie and style your balloons for stunning party displays or table centrepieces.
Heavy Duty & Durable: Weighing 85g each, these balloon weights are designed to hold multiple helium balloons securely, ensuring your decorations stay in place at indoor or outdoor events.
Perfect for Any Celebration: Ideal for birthdays, weddings, baby showers, or engagement parties, these red star weights double as eye-catching table decorations to elevate your event decor.
Easy to Use for All Events: Simply attach your balloons to the star-shaped weights using the included ribbon – a hassle-free solution for creating beautiful balloon arches, bouquets, or centrepieces.
